pi_items.source: No employee with ID 'EMP-2055' found in any data source (employees_import.csv, bangalore_employees.csv, project_leads.csv, innovation_team.csv, q4_new_hires.csv). Other tasks reference numeric IDs (108, 120, 135, 148, 113, 137, 3001-3021, 4001-4006, 4031-4033, 4011-4012, 5001-5005) or hyphenated IDs like EMP-1024 and EMP-007, but no EMP-2055.
No employee named 'Anita Desai' found in any available data CSV files. Searched all employee data sources with no match.

Dates are logically valid: February 10, 2025 is Monday; February 11 is Tuesday; February 12 is Wednesday. All are working days (Mon-Wed). Dates are in the past relative to current date (March 7, 2026) but are valid calendar dates within a normal HRMS testing range.
Verifier.py (line 26) confirms this as the target status with lowercase matching 'on duty' or 'od'. Status name is consistent with HRMS terminology.
Verifier.py (line 27) searches for 'client' keyword (lowercase) in remarks field. 'Client Site Implementation' contains 'client' and would match the verification logic.

Verified via setup_attendhrm.ps1 script (lines 369-374) and q4_compliance_data_fix setup and export scripts. All working scripts reference 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Attend HRM\Data\DEMO.FDB' as the actual database path. This discrepancy is documented in multiple validated_pi.json files from other tasks (configure_week_off, manual_attendance_entry, add_employee_dependent). The metadata claim of a ProgramData path contradicts the actual implementation.

pi_items.metadata_value: setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 referenced in task.json hooks
pi_items.source: Critical finding: The task.json references hooks that call 'C:\workspace\tasks\regularize_attendance_on_duty\setup_task.ps1' and 'C:\workspace\tasks\regularize_attendance_on_duty\export_result.ps1', but these files do not exist in the task directory. Directory listing shows only: task.json, verifier.py, __pycache__/. Compare with working task q4_compliance_data_fix which has both setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 files. Without these scripts, the task cannot be properly initialized or verified.

privileged_info_summary: AttendHRM is a verified legitimate HRMS software from Lenvica. The task requires changing attendance status for employee Anita Desai (EMP-2055) for three working days (Mon-Wed, Feb 10-12, 2025) to 'On Duty' with remark 'Client Site Implementation'. However, critical task infrastructure is incomplete: (1) Employee 'Anita Desai' with ID 'EMP-2055' does not exist in any available data source; (2) Required setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 PowerShell scripts are missing from the task directory (referenced in task.json hooks but not present); (3) The metadata specifies an incorrect database path (ProgramData instead of actual Program Files location). The task cannot be executed or verified in its current incomplete state.
